title: Creamy Chinese Corn Tortilla Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy weeknight dish that combines creamy corn tortillas with vegetables for a satisfyingly rich flavor profile.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of corn tortilla chips
ingredients.notes: Halved or torn into small pieces

ingredients.name: 2 cups of mixed vegetables (e.g., carrots, bell peppers, onions)
1 can of corn, drained and rinsed
1/4 cup of cream cheese or vegan cream cheese (optional)

instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the corn tortilla chips and sauté until lightly golden, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the mixed vegetables and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the garlic and soy sauce; stir well to combine.
If using cream cheese, add it now and mix thoroughly. If not, you can skip this step.
Squeeze in the lime juice, then stir everything together again.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 5 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles as desired.
